note: Stopword & rare-literal noise (field-found on Grafana, 0.4.0): a component rendering a bare stopword ('BY') is a rare literal whose high IDF let it outrank the component that renders the whole phrase, and a stopword-only query ('The') returned confident matches. Fix (6F.9): drop stopword-only query terms and reject stopword-only rendered-text targets, so the exact-phrase component wins and a stopword query declines no-signal.
